programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri must escape the Punishment Dome, a sadistic system of entertainment and political control on Varos.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor of Varos begins to suspect someone is working against him. The alien Sil puts his plans into motion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor faces the punishment dome alongside Peri whilst the Doctor fights to stop the evil alien Sil.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors
programme.desc: The Second Doctor and Jamie visit space station Camera to speak to the scientist Dastari.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri meet Jamie and learn the Second Doctor is with the Sontarans on Earth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors
programme.desc: The Sixth Doctor meets the Second Doctor but events soon overtake them.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: A newly regenerated Doctor is taken to the Rani's base by Urak the Tetrap, while Mel meets some of the Lakertyans - and falls into one of the Rani's traps.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: The Rani's impersonation of Mel backfires badly because Urak can't tell the difference, while the Doctor attempts to learn the secret of the Loyhargil.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: The furious Rani begins to slaughter the Lakertyans, so Mel rallies the survivors, while the Doctor is readied to donate his mind to the Rani's grotesque experiment.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who Time and the Rani
programme.desc: As Mel convinces the Lakertyans fight back, the Tetraps turn on the Rani and the Doctor ensures the missile is deflected away from the asteroid.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: The Doctor and Mel end up in South Wales along with an assassin and his intended victim...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: Gavrok and the Bannermen have arrived on Earth, searching for Delta and slaughter the holidaymakers without compunction to draw her out.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Delta and the Bannermen
programme.desc: As Billy and Ray do what they can to help save Delta and the baby, the Doctor and Goronwy the beekeeper face Gavrok and his Bannermen one last time...

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: Mel and the Doctor are in for a cool reception on the trading colony Iceworld, where they discover excitable teenage waitress Ace, space maverick Sabalom Glitz, and legends of dragons and treasure.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: The time travellers, accompanied by Glitz and Ace, search the ice caves for the treasure which is supposed to be guarded by a fearsome dragon. Little do they are leading Kane straight to it.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dragonfire
programme.desc: Having sold their souls to him years ago, Kane's disaffected staff plot to kill him. Meanwhile, he plots to obtain the dragon's treasure so he can escape from Iceworld and wreak havoc once more.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: In Shoreditch, 1963, the Doctor’s past begins to catch up with him at the Totter’s Lane junkyard where his adventures began - and to where an old terror is returning.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: Renegade Daleks battle Imperial Daleks for control of the Hand of Omega and Ace takes them on single-handedly at Coal Hill School, while Ratcliffe makes his move.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the difference between the two Dalek factions and why they want a stellar manipulator. He hopes Captain Gilmore's people are up to the task ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: The streets of East London shake under a civil war bering fought between the Daleks, as the Doctor forces the Dalek Emperor to reveal himself to be Davros, waging one last battle.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: As UNIT is transporting a nuclear warhead around Carbury, knights in armour arrive to continue waging a war that began thousands of years ago, but in a wholly different dimension.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: The Doctor and Ace explore King Arthur’s spaceship deep under Lake Vortigern, while Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart arrives in Carbury where he encounters Morgaine...

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: Furious at her inability to find and engage Arthur in battle, Morgaine threatens to unleash the Destroyer upon the planet unless the Doctor gives her what she wants.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Battlefield
programme.desc: The Brigadier slays the Destroyer while Morgaine takes control of UNIT's nuclear warhead and prepares to start a countdown that will destroy Earth forever.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Expert Cesar Millan rehabilitates dogs with behavioral issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: 10 Puppies And Us

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for what’s set to be an even bigger and better third series of The Dog Rescuers.

programme.desc: Grace discovers Rochelle Cross' true identity with Darius' help. Kerissa welcomes Triumph's new accountant and learns two hundred thousand dollars is missing.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Greenleafs' IRS issues escalate when the FBI raids both Calvary and Triumph on suspicion of embezzlement; Grace questions her paternity when Aaron tells her that his father, Lionel, died.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Mae preaches beautifully at A Day With Lady Mae as the Bishop fears he may lose Calvary; Grace gets a paternity test with Aaron and works with Jacob to clear their family name.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: After the success of her big day, Lady Mae is denied the right to run Calvary despite support from the Bishop; Grace takes over thanks to Connie and joins Harmony & Hope Ministries.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost attempts to retrieve evidence while throwing the party of his career; Tasha forms an unlikely alliance in an effort to save her family; Tommy considers a move that could change everyone's lives.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost faces threats from all sides following his arrest for the murder of Agent Knox; Tasha scrambles to get bail as the Feds begin to build their case; Tommy navigates his new role and enlists help in recovering Tariq.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Proctor works to protect his client as Ghost faces harassment; the team discusses its strategy for taking down St. Patrick; Tommy struggles to let go of his old duties; Tasha talks to the children about what is going on.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy executes a plan to divert the attention of prosecutors; Teresi begins a blackmail scheme after learning information about Ghost; Tariq seeks out Kanan.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa es la nueva líder comunitaria del barrio y Víctor se convierte en un héroe dentro del hotel. Belinda está aterrada porque Hugo está libre, pero Marisa lo enfrenta. Catalina se propone conquistar a Cristóbal y Sara descubre su juego.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La campaña del senador Parker llama la atención de la prensa y lo invitan a una entrevista, pero Ty no esperaba que manipularían el cuento de la Cenicienta de Queens. A espaldas de Sara, Bruno y Yaya no aguantan y caen en la tentación.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: A Ty lo llevan de emergencia al hospital y su carrera política peligra. Marisa visita al senador y constata que Sara y Cristóbal están juntos, pero Carmen le pide a Marisa que luche por él. Tito cae en las provocaciones de Bruno.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia disfruta de la compañía de sus hijos, aunque le hacen preguntas que ella debe contestar. Sebastián y ella tienen un enfrentamiento que trae consecuencias que pueden ser graves.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Dimas atiende a Sebastián, quien aprovecha para hacerle preguntas sobre Alicia. Ella debe hacer un viaje a la capital, mientras a los gemelos les toca defender la reputación de su madre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Justino siente la ausencia de Alicia, Perfecta se entera que él está solo y decide visitarlo para decirle toda la verdad. Un hombre misterioso ve a Alicia cuando ella decide aplazar su regreso.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia visita a una persona muy especial en la capital, pero el encuentro resulta muy doloroso. Briñón tiene un mal presentimiento justo cuando tratan de llevársela por la fuerza.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda y Reinaldo toman un helado frente al mar. Teresa Cristina le advierte a Juan Pablo que si pone a la tía Iris en contacto con Reinaldo lo matará. Rafael habla con Antonio sobre la deuda que tenía con Mirna. Máximo y Bárbara llegan a Miami.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Amalia hace el amor con Rafael en Fashion Motors y pierde su virginidad. Gabriel se aparece de noche en el Gourmet Palmer buscando a Griselda. Kike se pone mal con el regreso de Bárbara, falta al trabajo y se olvida de buscar a Kikito en el colegio.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo siente admiración por Griselda. Ella está furiosa y echa a Gabriel del Gourmet Palmer. Kike busca a Bárbara en el hotel y la enfrenta, le advierte que mientras esté en Miami hará de su vida un infierno. Bárbara llora y Máximo la consuela.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Máximo visita a Kike en su casa y conversan sobre Bárbara, Griselda está presente también. Kike se compromete a no buscar más a Bárbara. Reinaldo cocina delante de Griselda, durante la segunda noche de reparaciones en el Gourmet Palmer.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: En Queens, Marisa sorprende al senador en plena campaña. Yaya pone al día a su jefa del rumbo que toma el mitin político en el barrio de la Cenicienta. Catalina se le voltea a Sara, mientras Cristóbal piensa que erró al emplear a Víctor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa es la nueva líder comunitaria del barrio y Víctor se convierte en un héroe dentro del hotel. Belinda está aterrada porque Hugo está libre, pero Marisa lo enfrenta. Catalina se propone conquistar a Cristóbal y Sara descubre su juego.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: La campaña del senador Parker llama la atención de la prensa y lo invitan a una entrevista, pero Ty no esperaba que manipularían el cuento de la Cenicienta de Queens. A espaldas de Sara, Bruno y Yaya no aguantan y caen en la tentación.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the rest of the Keaton family away for the weekend, Mallory is excited about having the house to herself until she is accidentally locked in the basement with the person she'd least like to be with--her adoring neighbor, Skippy.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With Elyse back at work, Steven is frustrated when her schedule and the baby's schedule aren't allowing them any free time together.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life (Part 1 of 2)

programme.desc: Steven takes a nostalgic trip to his hometown following the death of his father. With the support of Elyse and the children, he tries to prepare his mother for her new life. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: The rescue of an injured eagle takes a dangerous turn when Ty tumbles off a cliff. Animal reserve volunteers Georgie and Adam wreck a four-wheeler.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy learns jousting to help an injured medieval reenactor recover his confidence. Tim tries to teach Georgie how to drive.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou turns down a second date with an insurance inspector who later fails her inspection. Amy tries to help Georgie deal with upsetting news.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The mysterious ailment of Caleb's horse may be due to contaminated river water. Ty and Jack find some missing possums.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Her family goes in search of Georgie, who is second-guessing her decision to run away. Amy and Ty work to save Phoenix from pesticide poisoning.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty is enlisted to lend an extra hand during Jack and Tim's upcoming cattle drive, but an unexpected accident jeopardizes their entire enterprise.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim suspects that a sponsorship offer made to Jade is not entirely legitimate, so he enlists Amy's and Georgie's help in persuading her to reject it.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.desc: Larry volunteers at the hospital just to get an interview with a patient.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.desc: The gang and Mr. Gorpley go for an outing at a cabin and wind up capturing an escaped killer.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: While on vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go on a shopping spree and spend a whopping $140! To make sure that their wives don't repeat their spree Ricky and Fred take the ladies on their next fishing trip.

programme.desc: Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.desc: The Ricardos are anxious about their move to the country. Reality really sets in when Fred shows their apartment to a young couple. The Taylors will take the apartment but need to move in immediately.

programme.desc: Seven coaches compete in the Clash of the Coaches Face-Off, the final three artists unveil their 35-hour back pieces, and one artist wins $100,000 and the Ink Master title.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists tattoo their home states and face blind critiques by the judges, a competitor makes a drastic choice, and patriotic tattoos decide someone's fate in the Face Off.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The South aims to unify and rebound when the teams are tasked with a postcard mural on the side of a bus, and a compass rose elimination tattoo includes a game-changing twist.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Teams must unify or die in a two-day tattoo marathon that's all about collaboration, then the losers fight for survival with full-bodied American traditional fairy tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: To test legibility, the teams spin intricate designs with yarn on outdoor canvases, then get technical with schematic tattoos.

programme.desc: Competitors must win a suspended-art flash challenge for the right to assign canvases in the notoriously difficult pinup tattoo elimination.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The 10 remaining artists must set themselves apart from their regional teams and face off in head-to-head individual battles, and two competitors are sent home.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1987, un oficial de policía de Boston que respondió a una llamada por un altercado doméstico fue herido de muerte. Las autoridades hicieron una persecución a lo largo de la ciudad, pero solo pudieron encontrar las huellas del sospechoso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía aprende que a veces ni el “taser” detiene a algunos sospechosos. La patrulla se acerca a una pareja en una misteriosa camioneta. La policía detiene a una persona que reacciona extremadamente cortés.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un grupo de sospechosos juegan carreras con un vehículo robado. Un borracho tiene un cuchillo y parece que no escuchará las órdenes de los oficiales. Dos sospechosos regresan otra vez a la cárcel por sus problemas con las drogas.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un peatón corre sospechosamente en una calle oscura. Las cosas terminan mal para un sospechoso en moto robada cuando un helicóptero lo rastrea. Una pelea doméstica entre una pareja descubre otros crímenes imprevistos.

programme.title: El caso de mi vida
programme.desc: En busca de los ex miembros de French Connection que estaban preparando un gran golpe de estado entre América del Sur, España y el sur de Francia.

programme.title: Una probada de veneno
programme.desc: Los envenenadores son los asesinos más astutos, ya que confían en la falta de sigilo de sus víctimas para matarlas. los asesinos inteligentes son de las criaturas más peligrosas del mundo, y por lo general, no se satisfacen solo con un homicidio.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Saben tanto sobre el crimen como cualquier oficial, o cualquier criminal. Son los escritores de policiales y, a través de sus ojos, vemos el asesinato más asqueroso. Combinan las perspectivas de la aplicación de la ley, los delincuentes y el periodismo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 1986 All-Star Game resulted in an American League win that ended the National League's streak of winning the last 13 of 14 All-Star Games. Lou Whitaker and Frank White homered in the AL's 3-2 victory and Roger Clemens was named MVP.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The National League battles back twice late in a thrilling victory, highlighted by clutch hits from Fred McGriff and Moises Alou. The 1994 MLB All-Star Game was the first NL win since 1987.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: At Fenway Park, Pedro Martinez starts the 1999 All-Star Game with a bang, striking out five of the six batters he faced. He also received Most Valuable Player as the American League wins 4-1.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, Andy Van Slyke keeps you entertained during a snow delay, Mark Grace heats up along with the weather and Dave Stieb finds his slider.

programme.title: Play Ball
programme.desc: Atlanta Braves superstar Ronald Acuña Jr. shows off his custom Nike Diamond cleats and your favorite Big Leaguers discuss their least-favorite household chores.

programme.title: Prime 9
programme.desc: Check out the 9 best sliders and the pitchers who threw them, featuring Francisco Rodriguez, Steve Carlton, and Ron Guidry.

programme.title: All-Star Highlights
programme.desc: Check out highlights from the 1975 MLB All-Star Game from County Stadium in Milwaukee. Hank Aaron appears in his 21st and final All-Star game of his historic career.

programme.title: Baseball Seasons
programme.desc: The great Hank Aaron breaks Babe Ruth’s all-time home run record. The A’s dynasty continues as they roll through the American League and face off with the Dodgers in the World Series

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: In his 19th and final All-Star Game, Cal Ripken Jr. hits a home run to lead the American League to a 4-1 victory over the National League. The 2001 All-Star Game was also the final game for Padres right fielder Tony Gwynn.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: MST3K: Viking Women And The Sea Serpent
programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.title: Film Crew: The Wild Women of Wongo
programme.desc: Bob Honcho orders the Film Crew to provide a commentary track for the bizarre prehistoric adventure film, The Wild Women of Wongo (1958).

programme.title: MST3K: Bride Of The Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo, who conduct heinous experiments on human victims in an effort to create a race of atomic super-beings.

programme.title: MST3K: Gunslinger
programme.desc: The widow of a murdered sheriff attempts to clean up the crime in her small town with help from the man hired to kill her.

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Nick wants to take Kay out on a date, but isn't sure what they'd do. The short offers ideas like taffy pulls and scavenger sales. Nothing says romantic quite like a scavenger sale.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.desc: The first episode of the 1952 serial featuring Commander Cody's trip to the moon.

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja I

programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up; knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the children decide not to tell her about their mother's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: As the Louds prepare for Christmas, Lincoln's sled goes into their neighbor's yard, leading Lincoln and Clyde to attempt a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate; when Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The children give Lily an old singing toy from the attic to help her stop crying, but it quickly drives them crazy; the kids try to convince Dad of the wonders of modern technology after he declares war on their electronic devices.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana convinces the children to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero despite the heavy snowfall; when Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde, he realizes how overprotective Clyde's parents are.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: During a road trip to their vacation destination, everything that can go wrong for the family does.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl; Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family; she seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna learns Chunk was like her in high school and worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic; Lincoln wages war after his food is filched from the refrigerator.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photograph gets more "likes" on social media than Lori's, she tries to one-up her; thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on Lola's home-schooling.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city, where Lori struggles to be a city girl; Lincoln finds that Ronnie Anne has changed; the family uses stunt doubles in its plan to avoid Luan's April Fool's Day pranking.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team; Mom and Dad decide to build a secret bathroom after they become sick of waiting their turn in line.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy becomes annoyed when Lori and Leni start watching her vampire show because of a cute new character; Mom gets community service for racking up tickets.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up in an effort to make gym class better; Luan teaches Lucy how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family; Lori and Bobby worry that long-distance dating is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy; Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: As the Louds prepare for Christmas, Lincoln's sled goes into their neighbor's yard, leading Lincoln and Clyde to attempt a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana springs into action when she learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction; when Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job, but can't give up the perks that come along with it; when the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their baby-sitting club, but she quickly proves to be too aggressive; Ronnie Anne's grandparents decide to spy on her when she wants to go downtown.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hoping to win a songwriting contest, Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound or try to make something that the whole world will love.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs; Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together; when Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to the Royal Woods House of Terror, Lincoln and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears; Lola discovers that Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: As the Louds prepare for Christmas, Lincoln's sled goes into their neighbor's yard, leading Lincoln and Clyde to attempt a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change things up; Lori develops the yips when she finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de decidir que quiere ser estrella Vicky obliga a Timmy a que la ayude para obtener su primer papel; Papá descarga a Timmy y las hadas por el inodoro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Poof finalmente se convierte en un hada padrino, pero, por desgracia, le asignan a la señora Crocker.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Mr.Crocker se convierte en profesor en la Academia de Hadas; Poof empieza a aprender a hablar.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando papá se olvida de todos los suministros para el campamento de los Scouts Squirrely, Timmy intenta suavizar las cosas con historias de miedo alrededor de la fogata.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Cosmo y Wanda llevan a Timmy de regreso en el tiempo para conocer a sus antiguos ahijados, su interacción con ellos altera el futuro.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La banda busca entre los recuerdos de Cosmo sobre su adolescencia para saber por qué nunca se graduó en la academia.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Poof tiene problemas para dormir, Wanda intenta ayudar leyéndole un libro de cuentos de hadas clásico.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop remplaza a todas las mascotas de Dimmsdale por otras mascotas, pero malvadas. Timmy y sus padrinos deberán salvar la ciudad de esta nueva amenaza.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy descubre que él tiene que compartir sus hadas con la chica nueva en la escuela, Chloe Carmichael, pero cuando Chloe se da cuenta de que ella puede usar su magia para el bien, ella desea que todos en Dimmsdale deben compartir y el caos viene.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Catman cree que Timmy ha sido secuestrado, él recurre a Chloe y a Catgirl para trabajar en el rescate; Timmy es acosado por los paparazzi.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Chloe se une a los Squirrely Scouts y salva la tropa, ayudando a obtener su primera medalla al mérito; cuando Tim y Chloe descubren que tienen la misma fecha de nacimiento, deciden competir por la mejor fiesta.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Chloe quiere un animal con un parecido a Mr. Crocker, para que no esté en peligro; Timmy, Chloe y las hadas se meten dentro de Mr. Crocker para exterminar un germen.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Tim y Chloe deben ir al rescate, cuando los padres de Chloe deciden regresar a Cosmo y Wanda, que se disfrazaron de aves en su hábitat natural.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop se disfraza de chica para evitar que Chloe destruya el mundo de las antihadas; Timmy lleva a Chloe a conocer a Mark Chang, con el propósito de que él le demuestre que los extraterrestres existen.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de que Timmy y Chloe salvan la mascota querida de Dark Laser, este se allega a ellos como su guardespaldas; Timmy y Chloe quieren que Mr. Crocker tenga una novia para quitárselo de encima.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe cambian de lugares, pero Cosmo pierde las varitas y corren el riesgo de quedar atrapados así para siempre.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker crea clones de Cosmo y Wanda para entrar a la convención de padrinos y robar toda la magia. Timmy desea que Chloe pueda vivir en su película distópica favorita, pero se arrepiente cuando ve que todos están hambrientos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe cumplen su objetivo, que sus familias acampen juntas, pero sus padres se pelean; Chloe desea ser mamá para poder asistir a un evento con Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe ayudan a Gatoman a demostrarle a su novia que es un superhéroe real; el Sr. Crocker le enseña a su sobrino, Kevin Crocker, a cazar de padrinos mágicos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los Squirrley Scouts van al espacio para colocar una bandera en un terreno desconocido, con la esperanza de lograr un lugar especial de los Squirrely Scouts; Chloe pasa las vacaciones de verano estudiando, pero su niño interior no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: A pesar de las advertencias de Timmy, Chloe quiere liberar a la liebre de la clase; cuando el papá de Timmy compra la última Kale Patch Kid, Chloe quiere completar su colección robándola.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe se transforman en sirenas y salvan la ciudad sumergida de la Atlántida de un peligrosísimo monstruo marino; Chloe se convierte en vigilante de pasillos en la escuela, pero surgen problemas porque se toma el cargo demasiado en serio.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La Sra. Crocker deja al Sr. Crocker en casa solo por primera vez, y llama a Timmy para que le enseñe cómo divertirse; Chloe quiere romper el récord de asistencia, pero Timmy le dice que su escuela está suspendida y la lleva a un puesto de tacos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Mamá y papá quieren renovar sus votos matrimoniales en un crucero de aventura con caballeros, pero terminan en un crucero de tejedores; el Sr. Bickles auspicia un concurso de talentos, y todos participan excepto Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Poof llega a casa para las vacaciones de primavera, Chloe lo cuida mientras que Cosmo y Wanda salen a cenar.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La acampada de boyscouts se vuelve un caos cuando irrumpen los osos y el Sr. Crocker; los padres de Timmy y Chloe no les dejan salir juntos para celebrar su aniversario de amistad porque son de clases sociales diferentes.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Por cada hada, hay un anti-hadas, y por lo tanto Anti-Poof nace. Depende de Poof para detenerlo de destruir del mundo y sus seres queridos.

programme.desc: In Berlin, Tony finds a city with two distinct personalities.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony enjoys wonderful food and tries to avoid the cliches of TV chefs past.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony enjoys a whiskey at the end of the world in Argentina.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: New Yorker Tony sets out to discover a foreign land: South Carolina.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain sets out to rediscover the energy he loves in New York.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony finds there's much more to French Polynesia than beautiful scenery.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's in Singapore, a country devoted to plentiful and exquisite food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony goes on his own personal odyssey to analyze the Greek diet.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony reveals the silliest, biggest and baddest moments behind the scenes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony looks beyond the leis and luaus to find the true Hawaii.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony celebrates Zamir's 50th birthday with a trip to Romania.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to Jamaica to uncover the lesser-known region.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Damon confesses to his girlfriend Shanice that he's been cheating on her with 2 women and has a kid with Danielle who wants him to sign over his parental rights! Monica is scared that her fiancée Cedric is unfaithful. Can he prove her wrong?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kevis suspects Ashley of cheating, while she accuses him of infidelity. With a lie detector test, Steve aims to uncover the truth and shock them both. Secrets will be revealed, challenging their perceptions and relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Stephanie takes a lie-detector test to prove that she is faithful to her boyfriend; an engaged couple accuse each other of cheating; Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he is loyal.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeremiah says that his 14-year-old female client's mom agreed to the tattoo, but girlfriend Nikki can't shake off her 13-year-old sister's accusations against him. Then will Brandon's wife take him back after he attacked her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Once a celebrated boxer and devoted father, Don's life spiraled into addiction, destroying his family. With a final ultimatum, Steve offers guidance, but the path to change lies solely with Don.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jamarkus says he fears that his twins are not his own; a teen and his mother insist that he is not the father of his ex-girlfriend's baby; Leroy says there is no way his daughter's mother's son is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve confronts Wadall, a remorseless ex-convict who strangled his fiancée Jackie, while Jackie defends him. Can Steve convince her of the danger? Dee-Dee, a former gang member, seeks to save her younger sister Abigail from a life of crime.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: We'll talk to 2 college students on opposite ends of the hazing debate with an audience that's just like them! Then, a mother talks about losing her son to hazing and Katie tells all about how she finances her tuition!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by Simone, his ex, who alleges he fathered her 3 children. While he does admit to sleeping with her, he denies the kids because he says she slept around! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Al servicio de su majestad
programme.desc: Cuando el Agente 007 encuentra por fin el amor verdadero, se sumerge en una emocionante aventura llena de acción y peligro espectaculares, protagonizada por George Lazenby como el carismático Bond.

programme.title: Vive y deja morir
programme.desc: James Bond lucha contra las fuerzas de la magia negra en esta aventura de alto impacto que lo lanza desde las calles de Nueva York hasta los pantanosos paisajes de Louisiana.

programme.title: El hombre del revólver de oro
programme.desc: James Bond ha sido marcado por la muerte y necesitará sus instintos letales y su seductor encanto para sobrevivir en esta gran aventura llena de acción.

programme.title: La espía que me amó
programme.desc: Nadie lo hace mejor que Bond, y lo comprueba una vez más en esta explosiva y entretenida aventura que lo lleva de las pirámides egipcias hasta el fondo del océano y a una desafiante persecución de esquí en la cima de una montaña.

programme.title: Misión espacial
programme.desc: El agente 007 se lanza a una trepidante aventura que lo lleva desde Venecia hasta Río de Janeiro y más allá, al espacio exterior. Roger Moore encarna por cuarta vez al carismático agente 007.

programme.title: Sólo para sus ojos
programme.desc: James Bond se ve inmerso en una de sus más intensas aventuras en este paquete de acción, de increíbles acrobacias, encuentros apasionados y excitantes enfrentamientos.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two hot-shot rival Los Angeles detectives are forced to work together even though they are complete opposites. Finding themselves in prison together after being framed in a drug deal, the unlikely duo break out and go after a crime boss.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Two Russian and German snipers play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: Defiance is a riveting adventure that showcases the extraordinary true story of the Bielski brothers, simple farmers -outnumbered and outgunned- who turned a group of war refugees into powerful freedom fighters.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to help a snapping turtle with a fishing hook in its mouth.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out how the anteater is able to eat nearly 10,000 insects every day. And why the walrus is considered a keystone species in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bittersweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Vicious Tornado Troop leader Electra comes into season but will youngster Flash have the courage to claim her as his own? Graveyard second-in-command Milton finally gives up competing for females and leaves home.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Get ready, you're about to watch the crew enter the kill zone with some great white sharks!

programme.title: Wild Asia
programme.desc: A visually stunning and dramatic portrait of India’s mighty monsoon as it brings life — and death — to a thirsting land.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Set in Awash National Park, here we follow the life of a clan of Hamadryas Baboons. It’s a closely-knit group where aggression plays a vital role in ensuring strong family bonds and structure.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: After months of hunger, Echo's family are enjoying good times. The matriarch and her family are dustbathing at the safe home where Echo shelters her young.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: So, what is the truth about these so called murder hornets? Get ready to find out!

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Looks at the lives of baby animals raised in the zoos of the world and how their keepers ensure that they are brought up in a manner as close as possible to their natural habitat.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Africa’s Big Cats is a close look into the lives of three families of Africa’s most effective and iconic feline predators living in the famous Kruger Park: a lioness, a leopard and two cheetahs.

programme.title: Long Gone Wild
programme.desc: The killer whale is once again under siege, hunted for sale into the exploding marine theme park industry. An in-depth look at the case against captivity, the Whale Sanctuary Project, and covert missions in search of orcas held captive.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Malapascua

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: Yasmin Tajik is amazed at how a leopard, watching the impalas move below the tree it’s perched in, leaps out in one swift movement and kills one of the impala.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Would you be brave enough to hold paws with a lion? Watch as Coyote does just that!

programme.title: Elephant, Return to the Wild
programme.desc: Follow two elephants as they journey from bondage and servitude to their new lives in Elephant Haven's forest, where they are able to begin their recovery and rehabilitation into the wild.

programme.title: Living With Lions
programme.desc: It's the dry season near the Serengeti, and hungry lions threaten the livelihood of cattle-herders.

programme.title: Beast Legends
programme.desc: The Beast Seekers explore Mongolia’s Mountains in search of a massive, legendary creature with the head of an eagle, razor-sharp talons and the body of a gigantic lion.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A park ranger investigates a noise near his cabin and encounters a bear.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys search for Big Bull, a legendary 15-foot alligator.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: A young boy jumps in a pool with a gator, and Paul must avert disaster.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Wild Mississippi gators begin fighting with Paul’s Florida gators.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Three men tempt fate when they bring a buck, a buffalo, and a bull into their lives and homes.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Two families are torn apart by one member's choice to keep big cats close at hand.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Andes Adventure
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows viewers how to survive the grueling conditions of Patagonia in South America. He parachutes onto a windblown Steppe where there is little to eat and almost no shelter. Bear spends the night sleeping under a rock in freezing conditions.
